'''DL-X2''' was a [[Veril Line Systems/Legends|Veril Line Systems]] [[DL-series]] [[Security droid/Legends|security droid]] that worked for the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency.<ref name="CSWE" /> It was stationed in Sector 2 of the [[Tomorrowland Starport]].<ref name="ST" />

==Behind the scenes==
DL-X2 was a droid created as part of the [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']] ride for [[Disneyland]] in California.<ref name="ST" /> It was a modified version of an Imagineer-developed prop for the robot TK4600 from the [[NBC]] police drama series [[Wikipedia:Hill Street Blues|''Hill Street Blues'']].<ref name="Newborn">{{BookCite|author=Newborn, Alex|container=Star Tours|title=A Long Time Ago: Exploring the Star Wars Cinematic Universe|publisher=Sequart Organization|date=2015}}</ref> [[Hasbro]] released DL-X2 as an exclusive ''Star Tours'' action figure.<ref name="Hasbro">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Star Tours (toy line)|pack=DL-X2|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/potjstdlx2.asp}}</ref>
